items.title_zh: OpenAI去年总支出据悉达340亿美元，研发投入约190亿
items.title_en: OpenAI's Total Spending Reached $34 Billion Last Year, with R&D at $19 Billion
items.summary_zh: 据报道，OpenAI去年总支出达340亿美元，以求在计划的首次公开募股（IPO）之前抢占蓬勃发展的人工智能市场主导地位。报道称，经审计的财务数据显示，这家ChatGPT开发商2025年研发投入约190亿美元，销售及营销支出近60亿美元，此外还有其他各类开支。（新浪财经）
items.summary_en: OpenAI's total spending in 2025 reached $34 billion, including $19 billion on R&D and nearly $6 billion on sales and marketing, according to audited financial data. The heavy investment aims to dominate the AI market ahead of a planned IPO.
items.why_zh: 该数据揭示了OpenAI在IPO前的大规模投入，反映了AI行业竞争的白热化程度。
items.why_en: This data reveals OpenAI's massive pre-IPO spending, highlighting the intense competition in the AI industry.

items.title_zh: IDC：全球服务器营收 2026Q1 同比增长 30.4%，戴尔稳居第一 OEM
items.title_en: IDC: Global Server Revenue Up 30.4% YoY in Q1 2026, Dell Remains Top OEM
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，IDC 在其美国当地时间 15 日发布的新闻稿中表示，全球服务器市场在 2026 年 1 季度营业收入规模达到 1226 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 8302.36 亿元人民币），同比增长 30.4%。 图源：Pixabay 其中 Dell（戴尔）一家独占 16.5%，同比增幅达到惊人的 244.1%，牢牢占据第一大服务器 OEM 地位，与身后的 Supermicro（超微）拉开 8.9 个百分点的差距。ODM 直销模式在整体市场中的占比则从去年同期的 64.1% 下滑至 50.2%。 从指令集角度，非 x86 服务器的市占在 2026Q1 达到 47.9%，同比增幅 107.6%。而在算力类型角度，GPU 加速服务器在市场中的占比为 56.2%；其它加速服务器营收同比激增 122.1%。 而在地域维度上，加拿大实现 190.9% 同比增长，中东和非洲则有 121.4% 增幅。美国服务器市场单季营收规模 796 亿美元，同比 +24.1%；中国市场规模则扩大 30.9% 至 192 亿美元。 图源：Pexels IDC 认为 服务器市场短期内的增长瓶颈位于供应侧 ： AI 基础设施投资持续追加，但非加速服务器的出货与营收受到存储半导体等零组件供应受限的遏制。而到 2027 年，随着 CPU、DRAM、NAND、HDD 的新产能投入运行，当前的窘境…
items.summary_en: Global server revenue reached $122.6 billion in Q1 2026, up 30.4% YoY. Dell led with 16.5% share, growing 244.1%. Non-x86 servers accounted for 47.9% and GPU-accelerated servers 56.2%. Supply-side constraints limit non-accelerated server growth.
items.why_zh: 该报告反映了AI基础设施投资的强劲势头及服务器市场的结构性变化。
items.why_en: This report reflects the strong momentum of AI infrastructure investment and structural shifts in the server market.

items.title_zh: 市场消息：DeepSeek结束逾70亿美元的融资
items.title_en: DeepSeek Closes Over $7 Billion Funding Round, Valuation Exceeds $50 Billion
items.summary_zh: 市场消息：DeepSeek结束逾70亿美元的融资，本轮融资对该公司的估值超过500亿美元。（新浪财经）
items.summary_en: DeepSeek has closed a funding round of over $7 billion, valuing the company at more than $50 billion, according to market sources. The massive round underscores investor enthusiasm for AI startups.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的高估值和巨额融资表明AI初创公司仍受资本追捧。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's high valuation and massive funding round indicate strong capital interest in AI startups.

items.title_zh: 英伟达员工考公上岸引热议，黄仁勋曾称“尽力给员工支付尽可能高的薪水”
items.title_en: Nvidia Employee Passes Civil Service Exam, Jensen Huang Once Said He Pays as High as Possible
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，根据“合肥先锋”公众号 6 月 14 日发布的《 合肥市 2026 年度考试录用公务员拟录用人员名单公示（三） 》， 一位曾在英伟达半导体科技（上海）有限公司工作的男性“考公上岸”，入选拟录用人员名单 。 这一消息被发现后，引发了网络热议。多个财经、科技类大 V 账号转发并评论，“ 英伟达再牛，终点还是上岸 ”成为热门话题。网友感慨：“果然男人一过 35，不是财务自由，就是上岸。” 英伟达作为全球 AI 芯片龙头企业，近年来业绩爆发式增长，2027 财年第一财季（2026 年 1 月 26 日～2026 年 4 月 26 日）营业总收入 816.15 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 5526.89 亿元人民币），同比增长 85%；归母净利润 583.21 亿美元（现汇率约合 3949.45 亿元人民币），同比增长 211%。 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋也曾表示 ，公司“应该尽可能多地奖励员工”。“我确实尽力给员工支付尽可能高的薪水，”他说。“但这并不一定意味着我的方法就是正确的。”
items.summary_en: A former Nvidia employee in Shanghai was listed in Hefei's civil service recruitment, sparking online discussion. Nvidia reported Q1 FY2027 revenue of $81.6 billion, up 85% YoY. CEO Jensen Huang once said he pays employees as high as possible.
items.why_zh: 该事件反映了AI行业高薪与公务员稳定之间的职业选择矛盾。
items.why_en: This incident highlights the career choice dilemma between high AI industry salaries and stable government jobs.

items.title_zh: “全球大模型第一股”智谱再度大涨超10%，市值突破7000亿港元！ A股如何借道布局？
items.title_en: Zhipu Surges Over 10%, Market Cap Exceeds HK$700 Billion
items.summary_zh: “全球大模型第一股”智谱再度大涨超10%，市值突破7000亿港元！ A股如何借道布局？ 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu, known as the 'first global large model stock,' surged over 10%, pushing its market cap above HK$700 billion. The rally reflects investor confidence in Chinese AI model companies.
items.why_zh: 智谱的市值突破显示市场对国产大模型的高度认可。
items.why_en: Zhipu's market cap milestone shows strong market recognition of domestic large language models.

items.title_zh: 谷歌更新安卓开发最佳 AI 模型榜单：Gemini 3.5 Flash 成本最贵，约为 DeepSeek V4 Flash 的 17.5 倍
items.title_en: Google Updates Android Dev AI Model Rankings: Gemini 3.5 Flash Costs 17.5x More Than DeepSeek V4 Flash
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，谷歌昨日（6 月 15 日）更新其 Android Bench 榜单， 自家 Gemini 3.5 Flash 模型成绩明显低于外界预期。 IT之家注：Android Bench 是谷歌官方推出的安卓开发任务基准测试，用来评估不同 AI 模型在代码编写、问题解决与开发辅助方面的实际能力。 该测试更贴近真实开发场景，专门衡量 AI 模型完成安卓开发任务的能力， 因此对开发者选择模型有较强参考价值。 根据谷歌官方更新的 Android Bench 榜单，OpenAI 的 GPT-5.5 模型以 74 得分位居榜首，GPT-5.4 模型以 72.4 得分位居第二。 谷歌自家的 Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview 以 72.4 得分位居第三；而 Claude Opus 4.7（68.7 分）和 Opus 4.6（66.6 分）位居第四和第五。 其中让 Android Authority 等媒体感到惊讶的是，谷歌 Gemini 3.5 Flash 只拿到 63.7 分，最终排在第 6，未进入前 5。 在平均 Token 消耗量（每次基准测试包括 100 个任务，执行 10 次计算平均消耗）方面，谷歌 Gemini 3.5 Flash 平均消耗 3.559 亿 Tokens ，折合单次运行平均成本 147.1 美元（现汇率约合 996.1 元人民币），…
items.summary_en: Google updated its Android Bench rankings: GPT-5.5 leads with 74 points, while Gemini 3.5 Flash scored 63.7 (6th) but costs $147.1 per run, about 17.5x more than DeepSeek V4 Flash, raising cost-efficiency concerns.
items.why_zh: 该榜单揭示了不同AI模型在安卓开发中的性能与成本差异，对开发者选型有重要参考价值。
items.why_en: The rankings reveal performance and cost differences among AI models for Android development, offering key insights for developer choices.

items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴发布首个具身智能大模型 Qwen-Robot 系列，为机器人打造手、脚、大脑通用底座
items.title_en: Alibaba Releases First Embodied AI Model Series Qwen-Robot
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，阿里巴巴发布千问具身智能大模型 Qwen-Robot 系列，包含 VLA 操作模型 Qwen-RobotManip、VLN 移动模型 Qwen-RobotNav 和世界模型 Qwen-RobotWorld 三大模型。 这是千问大模型家族首个完整的具身智能模型系列 —— 三个模型分别为机器人装上灵巧的手、认路的脚和会思考的大脑，既可单独部署，也能协同运转，让不同形态的机器人迈向真实落地有了可靠的“通用底座”。 Qwen-RobotNav ： 物理智能体的行动入口 — 通过可控观测编码和工具接口，把视觉语言能力接入移动控制，统一了指令跟随、点 / 目标导航、目标追踪和自动驾驶四类任务 Qwen-RobotManip ： 物理智能体的交互基石 — 通过规范状态-动作空间和相机坐标系下的末端执行器增量位姿，把视觉语言能力接入操作控制，基于完全由开源数据构建的 >38,100 小时语料库实现了大规模多机型训练 Qwen-RobotWorld ： 物理智能体的无限世界 — 通过自然语言动作接口，把视觉语言能力接入世界动态预测，让同一个世界模型能够跨操作、驾驶和导航场景预测符合物理规律的未来。 IT之家注意到，5 月 20 日，阿里巴巴发布全新一代千问旗舰模型 Qwen3.7-Max，在三方机构 Arena 全球大模型盲测总榜中，Qwen3.7-Max 超过 Ki…
items.summary_en: Alibaba launched the Qwen-Robot series, including manipulation (Qwen-RobotManip), navigation (Qwen-RobotNav), and world model (Qwen-RobotWorld). They provide a universal foundation for robots with dexterous manipulation, autonomous navigation, and world prediction, trained on over 38,100 hours of open-source data.
items.why_zh: 该系列是千问大模型首个完整具身智能模型，标志着阿里巴巴在机器人AI领域的重要布局。
items.why_en: This series is Alibaba's first complete embodied AI model family, marking a significant step in robotics AI.

items.title_zh: UrbanWell：评估多模态大模型的城市福祉时空分析能力
items.title_en: UrbanWell: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models for Spatio-Temporal Urban Wellbeing Analytics
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出UrbanWell基准，用于系统评估多模态大模型在时空推理方面的能力，特别是通过卫星和街景图像联合建模城市福祉。该基准涵盖38个城市多年数据，包括环境条件（如CO₂）等指标，旨在测试模型整合异构时空信号的能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15890v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding urban wellbeing from multimodal data requires integrating heterogeneous spatial and temporal signals, posing significant challenges for current multimodal large language models (MLLMs). We introduce UrbanWell, a large-scale benchmark designed to systematically evaluate the spatio-temporal reasoning capabilities of MLLMs for urban wellbeing analytics through joint modeling of satellite and street view imagery. UrbanWell spans 38 cities across multiple years and includes diverse indicators covering (1) environmental conditions (CO$_2$…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了多模态大模型在城市福祉时空分析评估方面的空白。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in evaluating multimodal LLMs for spatio-temporal urban wellbeing analytics.

items.title_zh: SAM中的纹理证据存在于何处？特征、提议掩码与纹理分割
items.title_en: Where Does Texture Evidence Live in SAM? Features, Proposal Masks, and Texture Segmentation
items.summary_zh: 纹理分割对基础分割模型构成挑战，因为有意义区域由材质或重复外观而非物体身份定义。Segment Anything Models (SAMs) 在默认情况下往往无法正确分割纹理定义的区域，但这种失败的原因尚不明确：纹理证据可能缺失、不在提议掩码库中，或者存在但被以物体为中心的读取方式错误选择或组合。本文研究了冻结的SAM在适应前是否已经保留了纹理相关的证据，并探索了两种冻结证据空间。该工作有助于理解SAM的内部表征，并为改进纹理分割提供方向。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14755v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Texture segmentation stresses foundation segmentation because meaningful regions are defined by material or repeated appearance rather than object identity. Segment Anything Models (SAMs) often fail by default on such texture-defined partitions, but this failure is ambiguous: the texture evidence may be absent, missing from the proposal bank, or present but selected or assembled incorrectly by an object-centric readout. We ask what texture-relevant evidence is already preserved in frozen SAM before adaptation. We study two frozen evidence space…
items.why_zh: 揭示了SAM在纹理分割任务中的失败原因，为改进基础模型的纹理感知能力提供关键见解。
items.why_en: Reveals why SAM fails on texture segmentation, offering insights for improving texture perception in foundation models.

items.title_zh: 利用皮层几何、连接和功能作为循环神经网络的归纳偏置
items.title_en: Harnessing cortical geometry, wiring, and function as inductive biases for recurrent neural networks
items.summary_zh: 皮层如何通过其连接和功能组织塑造循环计算，是神经科学和机器学习领域的核心问题。本文利用MICrONS项目的数据——涵盖小鼠视觉皮层多个区域的功能连接组学资源，其中密集钙成像与高分辨率电子显微镜重建共同注册——构建了生物学基础的循环神经网络。通过使用神经元空间共定位等信息，该研究将皮层几何和连接作为归纳偏置引入网络，旨在提升循环神经网络的计算效率和对生物神经网络的模拟真实性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14975v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: How the wiring and functional organization of cortex shape recurrent computation remains a central question in both neuroscience and machine learning. Here, we leverage data released through the Machine Intelligence from Cortical Networks (MICrONS) program--a functional connectomics resource spanning multiple areas of mouse visual cortex, in which dense calcium imaging is co-registered with high-resolution electron microscopy reconstruction from the same animal--to build biologically grounded recurrent neural networks. Using neuronal spatial co…
items.why_zh: 将真实的皮层结构和功能数据融入循环神经网络设计，有望推动更高效、更类脑的AI模型发展。
items.why_en: Integrating real cortical structure and function into RNN design may lead to more efficient and brain-like AI models.

items.title_zh: FreeSonic：无需训练的时序感知解耦注意力实现精确音频编辑
items.title_en: FreeSonic: Training-Free Temporal-Aware Decoupled Attention for Precise Audio Editing
items.summary_zh: 文本到音频生成取得了显著进展，但实现精确且一致的音频编辑仍是重大挑战。现有方法难以平衡时序一致性与背景保留。本文提出FreeSonic，一种无需训练的框架，利用基于Rectified Flow的最先进TangoFlux模型。FreeSonic采用优化的反转-逆过程以及联合文本-音频注意力图，实现精确的目标片段提取。在内容编辑方面，引入了一种新颖的调度注意力机制，以保持编辑区域的时序一致性并保护背景。实验表明，FreeSonic在多种音频编辑任务上达到了领先性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15186v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Text-to-audio (TTA) generation has made significant strides, yet achieving precise and consistent audio editing remains a major challenge. However, existing methods struggle to balance temporal consistency with background preservation. In this paper, we propose FreeSonic, a training-free framework leveraging the state-of-the-art Rectified Flow-based TangoFlux model. FreeSonic utilizes an optimized inversion-reverse process and joint text-audio attention maps for precise target segment extraction. For content editing, a novel scheduled attention…
items.why_zh: 无需额外训练即可实现高质量音频编辑，为音频内容创作和后期处理提供了高效工具。
items.why_en: Enables high-quality audio editing without extra training, offering an efficient tool for audio content creation and post-processing.

items.title_zh: CIWI-CKT：混沌信息波干涉特征融合与跨城市知识迁移的交通流预测
items.title_en: CIWI-CKT: Chaos-Informed Wave Interference Feature Fusion and Cross-City Knowledge Transfer for Traffic Flow Forecasting
items.summary_zh: 在跨城市、数据稀缺的场景下，准确的交通流预测仍然具有挑战性，因为有限的历史数据阻碍了模型泛化。交通动态的混沌特性、复杂的时空依赖关系以及异构的城市网络使得跨城市少样本学习变得困难。现有深度学习方法要么将交通视为完全确定性，要么缺乏建模波状干涉模式的机制，而这些模式对于跨状态交通动态至关重要。本文提出CIWI-CKT，一种融合混沌信息波干涉特征和跨城市知识迁移的框架，旨在通过引入混沌理论和波干涉特征来提升少样本场景下的预测精度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15642v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurate traffic flow prediction remains challenging in cross-city, data-scarce scenarios where limited historical data hinders model generalisation. The chaotic nature of traffic dynamics, complex spatio-temporal dependencies, and heterogeneous urban networks complicate few-shot learning across cities. Existing deep learning approaches either treat traffic as purely deterministic or lack mechanisms to model wave-like interference patterns essential for cross-regime traffic dynamics. To address these limitations, this paper proposes CIWI-CKT, a…
items.why_zh: 为数据稀缺的跨城市交通预测提供了新思路，有望提升智慧城市交通管理的泛化能力。
items.why_en: Offers a novel approach for cross-city traffic prediction under data scarcity, potentially improving generalization in smart city traffic management.

items.title_zh: 控制平面布局塑造遗忘：13种系统配置下Agent记忆的架构研究
items.title_en: Control-Plane Placement Shapes Forgetting: An Architectural Study of Agent Memory Across Thirteen System Configurations
items.summary_zh: LLM在Agent记忆流水线中的位置——介于召回平面（检索存储事实，已被广泛基准测试）和控制平面（通过替换、释放、清除来改变事实，基本未经测试）之间——决定了系统能够恢复哪些遗忘失败模式。通过比较13种系统配置在385个对抗性案例上的表现，观察到三种放置机制具有部分互补的覆盖范围：确定性原语足以处理词汇/时间类别，但在规范化方面失败（标识符混淆上5%，其他类别0%）。该研究揭示了控制平面布局对Agent记忆遗忘行为的关键影响。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15903v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Where an LLM sits in an agent memory pipeline -- between the recall plane that retrieves stored facts (extensively benchmarked) and the control plane that mutates them via supersede, release, purge (largely untested) -- shapes which forgetting failure modes the system recovers. Comparing thirteen system configurations on a 385-case adversarial surface, we observe three placement regimes with partly complementary coverage: deterministic primitives suffice for lexical/temporal categories but fail canonicalization (5% on identifier-obfuscation, 0%…
items.why_zh: 首次系统研究控制平面布局对Agent记忆遗忘的影响，为设计更鲁棒的AI Agent记忆系统提供指导。
items.why_en: First systematic study of how control-plane placement affects forgetting in agent memory, guiding the design of more robust AI agent memory systems.

items.title_zh: AuAu：审计大语言模型威权倾向的基准
items.title_en: AuAu: A Benchmark for Auditing Authoritarian Alignment in Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: 全球威权主义浪潮的兴起，加上LLM在用户日常生活中的核心作用日益增强，引发了关于特定模型在多大程度上表现或促进威权态度和特征的问题。本文引入AuAu，一个全面的基准测试，旨在评估LLM生成具有威权倾向响应的风险。该基准结合了三种评估方法：(i) 来自15个人类验证工具的心理测量问题；(ii) 情境行为小故事，探测预期行为；(iii) 其他评估维度。AuAu为检测和缓解LLM中的威权倾向提供了重要工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.16127v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The worldwide surge of authoritarianism, combined with the increasing central role in users' everyday lives, raises the question of to what extent specific models exhibit or promote authoritarian attitudes and characteristics. We introduce AuAu, a comprehensive benchmark that aims to assess the risk of LLMs generating responses with authoritarian tendencies. This benchmark combines three evaluation approaches: (i) psychometric questions from an extensive pool of 15 human validated instruments; (ii) contextual behavior vignettes probing intended…
items.why_zh: 首个系统审计LLM威权倾向的基准，对确保AI系统符合民主价值观具有重要意义。
items.why_en: First systematic benchmark for auditing authoritarian tendencies in LLMs, crucial for ensuring AI systems align with democratic values.

items.title_zh: 通过噪声放大揭示伪影：AI生成视频检测的新视角
items.title_en: Revealing Artifacts via Noise Amplification: A Novel Perspective for AI-Generated Video Detection
items.summary_zh: 随着视频生成模型的快速发展，区分AI生成视频与真实视频成为一项挑战。现有研究大多集中于开发检测生成对抗网络样本的检测器，但检测AI生成视频，尤其是文本到视频模型生成的视频，仍是一个未探索的领域。尽管最先进的文本到视频模型可以生成类似真实视频的视觉内容，但它们仍会留下细微伪影。本文提出通过噪声放大来揭示这些伪影，为AI生成视频检测提供了新视角。该方法利用AI生成视频在噪声放大后表现出的独特模式，实现高效检测。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.16742v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: With the rapid advancement of video generation models, distinguishing between AI-generated and authentic videos has emerged as a challenging endeavor. The majority of existing research endeavors concentrate on the development of detectors for identifying samples generated by generative adversarial networks. Nevertheless, the detection of AI-generated videos, particularly those produced by text-to-video models, still remains an uncharted territory. Although state-of-the-art text-to-video models can generate realistic visual content similar to re…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种创新的AI视频检测方法，有助于应对深度伪造视频带来的安全挑战。
items.why_en: Proposes an innovative detection method for AI-generated videos, helping address security challenges from deepfake videos.

items.title_zh: TuneJury：改进音乐生成偏好对齐的开放指标
items.title_en: TuneJury: An Open Metric for Improving Music Generation Preference Alignment
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍TuneJury，一个开放的、实例级别的文本到音乐成对奖励模型，能够根据文本提示和音频片段预测音乐偏好分数。发布的检查点基于公开的人类偏好标签训练，涵盖竞技场风格投票、度量对齐偏好对、众包成对比较和专家审美评分。两个片段之间的预测分数差在保留测试集上校准良好，支持通过简单分数阈值进行数据过滤。TuneJury在多个音乐生成任务上展现出良好的泛化能力，为改进音乐生成模型的偏好对齐提供了有效指标。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17006v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce TuneJury, an open, instance-level pairwise reward model for text-to-music that predicts a music preference score from a text prompt and an audio clip. The released checkpoint is trained on publicly available human-preference labels covering arena-style (A vs. B) votes, metric-alignment preference pairs, crowdsourced pairwise comparisons, and expert aesthetic ratings. The predicted score margin between two clips is well calibrated on our held-out test split, supporting data filtering via a simple score threshold. TuneJury generalize…
items.why_zh: 为音乐生成提供了开放的偏好对齐指标，有助于提升生成音乐的质量和用户满意度。
items.why_en: Provides an open preference alignment metric for music generation, helping improve generated music quality and user satisfaction.

items.title_zh: HAMON：用于长期预测的无源光学序列混合
items.title_en: HAMON: Passive Optical Sequence Mixing for Long-Horizon Forecasting
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究提出HAMON，一种无源衍射光学预测协处理器，用于长期时间序列预测。研究表明，简单的线性和频域模型在长期预测中仍具竞争力，而Transformer的密集叠加表示可能并非必需。HAMON利用光学计算实现低复杂度、近似线性的预测操作，有望在能效和速度上超越传统数字方法。该工作挑战了深度学习在时间序列预测中的主导地位，为光学计算在AI中的应用开辟了新路径。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17028v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Simple linear and frequency-domain models remain surprisingly competitive in long-horizon time-series forecasting, and recent mechanistic evidence suggests that standard forecasting benchmarks may not require the dense superposed representations that make transformers powerful in other domains. This raises a substrate-level question: if the core forecasting operator is often low-complexity and approximately linear, does it need to be implemented as learned digital temporal mixing? We introduce HAMON, a passive diffractive optical forecasting co…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了深度学习在时间序列预测中的必要性，展示了光学计算作为高效替代方案的潜力。
items.why_en: This work challenges the necessity of deep learning for time-series forecasting and demonstrates the potential of optical computing as an efficient alternative.

items.title_zh: LLM-WikiRace基准：LLM在真实知识图谱中的规划能力评估
items.title_en: LLM-WikiRace Benchmark: How Far Can LLMs Plan over Real-World Knowledge Graphs?
items.summary_zh: 研究人员推出LLM-WikiRace基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）在真实知识图谱中的规划、推理和世界知识能力。模型需通过维基百科超链接逐步从源页面导航至目标页面，考验前瞻性规划和概念关联推理。评估涵盖Gemini-3、GPT-5、Claude Opus 4.5等模型，在简单级别上表现最强。该基准揭示了LLM在复杂规划任务中的局限性，为提升模型推理能力提供了新测试平台。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.16902v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce LLM-Wikirace, a benchmark for evaluating planning, reasoning, and world knowledge in large language models (LLMs). In LLM-Wikirace, models must efficiently navigate Wikipedia hyperlinks step by step to reach a target page from a given source, requiring look-ahead planning and the ability to reason about how concepts are connected in the real world. We evaluate a broad set of open- and closed-source models, including Gemini-3, GPT-5, and Claude Opus 4.5, which achieve the strongest results on the easy level of the task and demonst…
items.why_zh: 该基准为评估LLM的规划与推理能力提供了新方法，揭示了当前模型在复杂知识导航中的不足。
items.why_en: This benchmark provides a new method to evaluate LLM planning and reasoning, revealing current models' shortcomings in complex knowledge navigation.

items.title_zh: 何时需要LLM？语言驱动型多臂老虎机的诊断方法
items.title_en: When Do We Need LLMs? A Diagnostic for Language-Driven Bandits
items.summary_zh: 研究针对包含文本和数值信息的上下文多臂老虎机问题，提出LLMP-UCB算法。该算法仅在必要时调用大语言模型进行推理，从而降低计算成本。在推荐系统、动态投资组合调整等金融场景中，LLM的频繁使用代价高昂且不确定性估计困难。LLMP-UCB通过诊断机制决定何时需要LLM，平衡了性能与效率。实验表明，该方法在保持决策质量的同时显著减少了LLM调用次数。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.05859v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study Contextual Multi-Armed Bandits (CMABs) for non-episodic decision-making problems where the context includes both textual and numerical information (e.g., recommendation systems, dynamic portfolio adjustments, offer selection; all frequent problems in finance). While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to these settings, utilizing LLMs for reasoning at every decision step is computationally expensive, and uncertainty estimates are difficult to obtain. To address this, we introduce LLMP-UCB, a bandit algorithm that de…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了LLM在决策问题中计算成本高的问题，提出了按需使用LLM的高效策略。
items.why_en: This work addresses the high computational cost of LLMs in decision-making by proposing an on-demand usage strategy.

items.title_zh: 虚拟言语治疗师：临床医生参与的AI言语治疗智能体
items.title_en: Virtual Speech Therapist: A Clinician-in-the-Loop AI Speech Therapy Agent for Personalized and Supervised Therapy
items.summary_zh: 论文开发了虚拟言语治疗师（VST），一个基于智能体的平台，用于口吃评估和个性化治疗规划。VST集成深度学习口吃分类和多智能体大语言模型推理，支持循证临床决策。系统从患者语音样本采集和特征提取开始，进行口吃类型分类，并基于结果生成定制治疗方案。临床医生可监督和调整AI建议，确保治疗的安全性和有效性。该平台有望提高言语治疗的普及性和个性化水平。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.01101v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: This paper develops Virtual Speech Therapist (VST), an intelligent agent-based platform that streamlines stuttering assessment and delivers customized therapy planning through automated and adaptive AI-driven workflows. VST integrates state-of-the-art deep learning-based stuttering classification, and multi-agent large language model (LLM) reasoning to support evidence-based clinical decision-making. The VST begins with the acquisition and feature extraction of patient speech samples, followed by robust classification of stuttering types. Bui…
items.why_zh: 该平台将AI与临床监督结合，有望提升言语治疗的可及性和个性化程度。
items.why_en: This platform combines AI with clinical oversight, potentially improving accessibility and personalization of speech therapy.

items.title_zh: 模型原生计算架构：通过计算机架构视角展望未来系统架构
items.title_en: Model-Native Computing Architecture: Envisioning Future System Architecture Through the Lens of Computer Architecture
items.summary_zh: 论文提出模型原生计算架构，将大语言模型类比为CPU，KV缓存为处理器缓存，上下文窗口为主存，智能体框架为操作系统。通过借鉴计算机架构数十年的经验，指导下一代模型原生系统的设计。研究探讨了缓存复用、上下文容量、智能体调度和权限控制等工程挑战，并映射到经典计算机系统问题。该视角为LLM系统设计提供了系统化的理论框架，有望推动AI基础设施的演进。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00288v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models are undergoing a transition from model technology to system technology. Engineering challenges like cache reuse, context capacity, agent scheduling, and permission control resemble classical computer systems problems. This raises a question: if we treat the LLM as a CPU, KV cache as processor cache, context window as main memory, and agent framework as an operating system, can decades of computer architecture wisdom guide next generation model native systems? This paper pursues this analogy as a visionary survey. We map…
items.why_zh: 该研究为LLM系统设计提供了系统化的计算机架构视角，有助于推动AI基础设施的演进。
items.why_en: This work provides a systematic computer architecture perspective for LLM system design, potentially advancing AI infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 投影与量化：从随机投影到RAG时代的哈希学习统一视角
items.title_en: Projection and Quantisation: A Unifying View of Learning to Hash, from Random Projections to the RAG Era
items.summary_zh: 论文提出投影-量化-组织视角，统一了近似最近邻搜索中的各种方法。该视角认为所有方法都涉及三个设计选择：投影位置、量化阈值和搜索代码组织。研究通过可复现的BitBudget基准测试验证了这一视角，并报告了三个发现。该工作旨在连接不同社区的研究，促进检索增强生成（RAG）等领域的进展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.04127v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Approximate nearest-neighbour search underpins large-scale retrieval and retrieval-augmented generation, yet its methods are studied in communities that seldom read one another. We argue that they form one field with three design choices. We develop the projection-quantisation-organisation lens: every method places its projections, places its quantisation thresholds, and organises the resulting codes for search. We test the lens with a reproducible measurement, released as the open BitBudget benchmark, and report three findings. First,…
items.why_zh: 该研究为近似最近邻搜索提供了统一视角，有助于促进检索增强生成等领域的发展。
items.why_en: This work provides a unifying view for approximate nearest-neighbor search, potentially advancing retrieval-augmented generation.

items.title_zh: 神经启发的多模态视觉语言模型能否抵御成员推断隐私泄露？
items.title_en: Are Neuro-Inspired Multi-Modal Vision-Language Models Resilient to Membership Inference Privacy Leakage?
items.summary_zh: 研究调查了多模态视觉语言模型（VLM）在成员推断攻击下的隐私泄露风险。尽管生物启发模型在单模态系统中表现出鲁棒性，但多模态模型可能面临新的攻击向量。论文在黑盒设置下分析了VLM的隐私漏洞，发现神经启发的多模态模型并非天然免疫。该工作强调了在部署多模态AI时需考虑隐私保护，并呼吁开发更安全的模型架构。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2511.20710v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In the age of agentic AI, the growing deployment of multi-modal models (MMs) has introduced new attack vectors that can leak sensitive training data in MMs, causing privacy leakage. This paper investigates a black-box privacy attack, i.e., membership inference attack (MIA) on multi-modal vision-language models (VLMs). State-of-the-art research analyzes privacy attacks primarily to unimodal AI-ML systems, while recent studies indicate MMs can also be vulnerable to privacy attacks. While researchers have demonstrated that biologically ins…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了多模态AI模型在隐私保护方面的脆弱性，对安全部署具有重要警示意义。
items.why_en: This study reveals privacy vulnerabilities in multi-modal AI models, providing important warnings for secure deployment.

items.title_zh: 基于无监督深度学习的苏丹冲突相关火灾近实时检测
items.title_en: Near--Real-Time Conflict-Related Fire Detection in Sudan Using Unsupervised Deep Learning
items.summary_zh: 研究利用无监督深度学习实现苏丹冲突相关火灾的近实时检测。方法基于轻量级变分自编码器（VAE）模型，结合3米分辨率的Planet Labs四波段卫星影像。系统可在24至36小时内检测到受火灾影响的区域，为冲突监测提供及时信息。该工作展示了深度学习在高频卫星图像分析中的应用潜力，有助于人道主义响应和灾害评估。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2512.07925v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Ongoing armed conflict in Sudan highlights the need for rapid monitoring of conflict-related fire-affected areas. Recent advances in deep learning and high-frequency satellite imagery enable near--real-time assessment of active fires and burn scars in war zones. This study presents a near--real-time monitoring approach using a lightweight Variational Auto-Encoder (VAE)--based model integrated with 4-band Planet Labs imagery at 3 m spatial resolution. We demonstrate that these impacted regions can be detected within approximately 24 to 3…
items.why_zh: 该研究为冲突地区的火灾监测提供了快速、自动化的方法，对人道主义救援具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work provides a rapid, automated method for fire monitoring in conflict zones, crucial for humanitarian response.

items.title_zh: 基于特征分析与图卷积神经网络的脑电信号癫痫发作检测
items.title_en: Epileptic Seizure Detection in Separate Frequency Bands Using Feature Analysis and Graph Convolutional Neural Network (GCN) from Electroencephalogram (EEG) Signals
items.summary_zh: 癫痫发作是由大脑异常过度电活动引起的神经系统疾病，脑电图（EEG）信号因其捕捉时空神经动态的能力而被广泛用于癫痫诊断。尽管最近的深度学习方法取得了高检测精度，但它们往往缺乏可解释性和神经生理学相关性。本研究提出了一种基于频率感知的癫痫发作检测框架，利用特征分析和图卷积神经网络（GCN）从EEG信号中检测发作期活动。该框架通过分离不同频带进行分析，旨在提高检测的可解释性，同时保持高准确性。这一方法有望为临床癫痫诊断提供更可靠的辅助工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.00163v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Epileptic seizures are neurological disorders characterized by abnormal and excessive electrical activity in the brain, resulting in recurrent seizure events. Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals are widely used for seizure diagnosis due to their ability to capture temporal and spatial neural dynamics. While recent deep learning methods have achieved high detection accuracy, they often lack interpretability and neurophysiological relevance. This study presents a frequency-aware framework for epileptic seizure detection based on ictal-phas…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过结合频率分析和GCN，提升了癫痫检测的可解释性，有助于临床诊断。
items.why_en: This work enhances interpretability in seizure detection, aiding clinical diagnosis.

items.title_zh: 超越判例法：评估法规中心法律问答中的结构感知检索与安全性
items.title_en: Beyond Case Law: Evaluating Structure-Aware Retrieval and Safety in Statute-Centric Legal QA
items.summary_zh: 法律问答基准主要关注判例法，忽视了法规中心推理的独特挑战。在法规领域，相关证据分布在层级关联的文档中，导致传统检索器失效，模型在不完整上下文中容易产生幻觉。为此，研究者引入了SearchFireSafety，一个面向法规中心法律问答的结构与安全感知基准。该基准以消防安全法规为例，评估模型在结构化检索和安全性方面的表现。这一工作填补了法规问答领域的空白，有助于提升法律AI的可靠性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.06173v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Legal QA benchmarks have predominantly focused on case law, overlooking the unique challenges of statute-centric regulatory reasoning. In statutory domains, relevant evidence is distributed across hierarchically linked documents, creating a statutory retrieval gap where conventional retrievers fail and models often hallucinate under incomplete context. We introduce SearchFireSafety, a structure- and safety-aware benchmark for statute-centric legal QA. Instantiated on fire-safety regulations as a representative case, the benchmark evalua…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了法规中心法律问答的空白，提升了法律AI的结构化检索与安全性。
items.why_en: This benchmark addresses the unique challenges of statute-centric legal QA, improving retrieval and safety.

items.title_zh: OmniMouse：基于1500亿神经令牌的多模态多任务脑模型扩展特性
items.title_en: OmniMouse: Scaling properties of multi-modal, multi-task Brain Models on 150B Neural Tokens
items.summary_zh: 数据与人工神经网络的扩展已推动AI在语言和视觉领域的突破，但类似原则是否适用于脑活动建模仍不清楚。本研究利用来自73只小鼠视觉皮层310万个神经元的数据集，总计超过1500亿神经令牌，记录于自然电影、图像、参数刺激和行为期间。研究者训练了多模态多任务模型，支持神经预测、行为解码和刺激重建三种灵活模式。实验揭示了脑模型扩展的规律，为神经科学中的大规模建模提供了新见解。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.18827v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Scaling data and artificial neural networks has transformed AI, driving breakthroughs in language and vision. Whether similar principles apply to modeling brain activity remains unclear. Here we leveraged a dataset of 3.1 million neurons from the visual cortex of 73 mice across 323 sessions, totaling more than 150 billion neural tokens recorded during natural movies, images and parametric stimuli, and behavior. We train multi-modal, multi-task models that support three regimes flexibly at test time: neural prediction, behavioral decodin…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了脑模型扩展的规律，为神经科学大规模建模提供了重要参考。
items.why_en: This work reveals scaling properties in brain modeling, advancing neuroscience AI.

items.title_zh: 下一代LLM智能体系统中合作的演化动力学：跨提供商的实证扩展
items.title_en: Evolutionary Dynamics of Cooperation in Next-Generation LLM Agent Systems: A Cross-Provider Empirical Extension
items.summary_zh: 下一代LLM智能体是否继承了前代的合作偏见？规模与提供商多样性如何重塑竞争多智能体环境中的均衡行为？Willis等人通过演化博弈论和迭代囚徒困境建立了基准，发现ChatGPT-4o和Claude 3.5 Sonnet存在一致的合作偏见。本研究将该基准扩展到2025-2026年发布的四个前沿模型：Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Gemini 3.1 Pro和GPT-5.4。结果显示，不同模型在合作倾向和策略稳定性上存在差异，为理解LLM智能体的社会行为提供了新视角。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29874v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Do next-generation LLM agents inherit the cooperative biases documented in their predecessors, or does scale and provider diversity reshape equilibrium behaviour in competitive multi-agent settings? Willis et al. established a benchmark for this question using evolutionary game theory and the Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma (IPD), finding consistent cooperative biases in ChatGPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. We extend this benchmark to four frontier models released in 2025-2026 - Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.4…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了不同LLM智能体的合作差异，对多智能体系统设计有重要影响。
items.why_en: This work uncovers provider-specific cooperation biases in LLM agents, informing multi-agent system design.

items.title_zh: 先检测再跳跃：视觉语言模型中的幻象检测
items.title_en: Detect Before You Leap: Mirage Detection in Vision-Language Models
items.summary_zh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）可能在视觉证据缺失、空白或与问题无关时产生自信的视觉答案，这种失败模式被称为“幻象”，在医学和文档VQA中尤为严重。本研究关注预生成幻象检测问题：给定图像-问题对，在生成前判断VLM应回答还是弃权。研究者提出了一种检测方法，旨在识别模型何时缺乏足够的视觉证据。该工作有助于提升VLM的可靠性，防止误导性输出。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00435v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) can produce confident visual answers even when the required visual evidence is missing, blank, or unrelated to the question. This failure mode, recently described as mirage (mirage2026), is especially concerning in medical and document VQA, where a plausible but visually ungrounded answer may be mistaken for image-based evidence. We study the complementary problem of pre-release mirage detection: given an image-question pair, determine whether the VLM should answer or abstain before generation. To that end,…
items.why_zh: 幻象检测能防止VLM在缺乏视觉证据时产生误导性答案，提升模型可靠性。
items.why_en: Mirage detection prevents VLMs from generating misleading answers without visual evidence, enhancing reliability.

items.title_zh: LIBERO-Occ：通过视角想象评估和改进场景诱导遮挡下的视觉-语言-动作模型
items.title_en: LIBERO-Occ: Evaluating and Improving Vision-Language-Action Models under Scene-Induced Occlusion via Viewpoint Imagination
items.summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在标准操作基准上表现强劲，但多数评估假设任务相关物体完全可见，这在现实场景中常因遮挡而失效。本文研究场景诱导遮挡对VLA模型的挑战，并引入LIBERO-Occ，一个基于LIBERO的遮挡扩展基准。实验表明，最先进的VLA模型在遮挡下性能显著下降。研究者提出通过视角想象来缓解遮挡影响，从而提升VLA模型在部分可观测环境中的鲁棒性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.10862v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve strong performance on standard manipulation benchmarks, but most evaluations assume that task-relevant objects are fully visible. This assumption often fails in realistic settings, where occlusion makes manipulation partially observable. In this paper, we study \textit{scene-induced occlusion} as a fundamental challenge for VLA models and introduce \textbf{LIBERO-Occ}, an occlusion-oriented extension of LIBERO. Experiments show that state-of-the-art VLAs suffer substantial performance degradat…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了遮挡对VLA模型的严重影响，并提出了改进方法，对机器人操作至关重要。
items.why_en: This work highlights occlusion challenges in VLA models and offers a solution, critical for real-world robotics.

items.title_zh: Clay-CNN混合模型：利用地理空间基础模型作为辅助上下文进行滑坡检测
items.title_en: Clay-CNN Hybrids: Leveraging Geospatial Foundation Models as Auxiliary Context for Landslide Detection
items.summary_zh: 快速灾后滑坡测绘对灾害响应至关重要，但由于极端类别不平衡，自动化仍困难。本研究评估了地理空间基础模型Clay v1.5能否改进像素级滑坡分割。在Landslide4Sense基准上，包含3799个训练样本，正像素仅约2%。研究者比较了三种策略：Clay作为主编码器、U-Net骨干增强Clay特征、以及Clay作为辅助上下文。结果表明，将Clay作为辅助上下文能有效提升分割性能，为滑坡检测提供了新方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14081v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Rapid post-event landslide mapping is essential for disaster response but remains difficult to automate due to extreme class imbalance. This study evaluates whether Clay v1.5, a Geospatial Foundation Model (GFM), can improve pixel-level landslide segmentation on the Landslide4Sense (L4S) benchmark, which contains 3,799 training chips with 14 Sentinel-2 and terrain bands and approximately 2% positive pixels. We compare three strategies: Clay as the primary encoder with multi-scale residual terrain fusion, a U-Net backbone augmented with…
items.why_zh: 该研究利用地理空间基础模型辅助滑坡检测，提升了灾害响应中的自动化能力。
items.why_en: This work leverages geospatial foundation models for landslide detection, enhancing disaster response automation.

items.title_zh: 机器学习与随机游走谜题：基于扩展窗口评估和SHAP可解释性的加元/美元汇率预测
items.title_en: Machine Learning and the Random Walk Puzzle: Forecasting the CAD/USD Exchange Rate with Expanding Window Evaluation and SHAP Interpretability
items.summary_zh: 本研究检验机器学习模型能否在预测月度美元/加元汇率时超越朴素随机游走基准。使用加拿大银行2017年1月至2026年5月的日数据，重采样为113个月度观测，评估了线性回归、随机森林、梯度提升、XGBoost和AdaBoost五种模型，并与随机游走和指数平滑（Holt-Winters）对比。所有模型采用扩展窗口评估，并利用SHAP进行可解释性分析。结果显示，部分ML模型在特定指标上优于随机游走，但整体优势有限，揭示了汇率预测的挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15058v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This study examines whether machine learning (ML) models can outperform the naive random walk benchmark in forecasting the monthly USD/CAD exchange rate. Using daily data from the Bank of Canada spanning January 2017 to May 2026, resampled into 113 monthly observations, five ML models are evaluated: linear regression, random forest, gradient boosting, XGBoost, and AdaBoost. These models are benchmarked against the naive random walk model and exponential smoothing with Holt-Winters seasonality (ETS). All models are evaluated using an expanding-win…
items.why_zh: 该研究验证了机器学习在汇率预测中相对于随机游走的有限优势，对金融预测有重要启示。
items.why_en: This work tests ML against random walk in exchange rate forecasting, offering insights into financial prediction limits.

items.title_zh: AI助力社会公益：伦敦环境法规对空气污染影响的因果研究
items.title_en: AI for Social Good: An Investigation of the Causal Relationship Between Environmental Regulations and Their Effects on Air Pollution in London, UK
items.summary_zh: 该研究开发了一种基于贝叶斯深度学习的不确定性感知框架，用于评估2010年至2020年间伦敦空气污染法规对PM2.5浓度的总体影响。由于政策实施的非随机性以及气象、社会经济变化、时间趋势和多重干预的叠加影响，传统方法难以准确估计法规效果。该框架整合了伦敦内城的每日PM2.5观测数据，能够量化不确定性，为城市空气质量管理提供更可靠的因果推断。研究结果有助于优化未来环境政策的制定，并展示了AI在环境治理中的潜力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15257v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Air pollution regulation is central to urban public health governance, but estimating its effects is difficult because policies are implemented non-randomly and pollution trajectories are shaped by meteorology, socioeconomic change, temporal trends, and overlapping interventions. This study develops an uncertainty-aware Bayesian deep learning framework to estimate the aggregate effect of air pollution regulations on PM$_{2.5}$ concentrations in London from 2010 to 2020. The framework integrates daily PM$_{2.5}$ observations from Inner London moni…
items.why_zh: 该研究展示了AI在环境政策评估中的实际应用，为城市空气污染治理提供了更精确的因果分析方法。
items.why_en: This work demonstrates AI's practical application in environmental policy evaluation, offering more precise causal analysis for urban air pollution control.

items.title_zh: 近最优随机线性赌博机：延迟反馈下的遗憾界
items.title_en: Near-Optimal Stochastic Linear Bandits with Delay
items.summary_zh: 该论文研究了多种延迟模型下的随机线性赌博机问题，并建立了近最优的遗憾界。结果表明，当延迟与损失无关时，延迟仅带来附加的遗憾惩罚，且线性结构与多臂赌博机行为相似；但在某些情况下，线性结构会带来新的挑战。研究为在线学习中的延迟反馈问题提供了理论保证，有助于改进推荐系统、广告投放等实际应用。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.16656v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study stochastic linear bandits with delayed feedback under several delay models and establish near-optimal regret guarantees. Our results identify when delayed linear bandits exhibit the same qualitative behavior as multi-armed bandits (MAB), and when the linear structure creates fundamentally new challenges. Specifically, (1) for \emph{loss-independent delays}, where the delay does not depend on the realized loss (but potentially depends on the arm), we show that delays incur only an additive regret penalty. Under stochastic delays, this pen…
items.why_zh: 该研究为延迟反馈下的在线学习提供了理论边界，对推荐系统和广告投放等实际场景具有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: This research provides theoretical bounds for online learning with delayed feedback, crucial for applications like recommendation systems and advertising.

items.title_zh: 你的隐私我的后门：差分隐私联邦学习中的后门攻击
items.title_en: Your Privacy My Cloak: Backdoor Attacks on Differentially Private Federated Learning
items.summary_zh: 先前研究认为差分隐私（DP）能增强联邦学习（FL）对后门攻击的鲁棒性，但本文挑战了这一假设。通过分析两种基线攻击策略，作者发现DP-FL中存在根本性矛盾：绕过DP时，现有防御能检测并过滤恶意更新；但遵守DP反而掩盖了恶意更新的统计特征，使防御失效。实验表明，DP降低了后门攻击的原始特征，导致现有防御无法有效识别。该研究揭示了隐私保护与安全防御之间的潜在冲突。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17035v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Prior research suggests that differential privacy (DP) inherently enhances the robustness of federated learning (FL) against backdoor attacks. In this paper, we challenge this assumption. Through an empirical analysis of two baseline attack strategies, we uncover a fundamental tension in DP-FL: while bypassing DP allows state-of-the-art defenses to detect and filter malicious updates, complying with DP inadvertently masks their distinguishing statistical characteristics. Consequently, existing defenses become ineffective as DP reduces the raw bac…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了差分隐私与后门防御之间的潜在冲突，对联邦学习的安全设计具有重要警示意义。
items.why_en: This work reveals a fundamental tension between differential privacy and backdoor defense in federated learning, important for secure system design.

items.title_zh: 基于深度学习的月球陨石坑地形相对导航
items.title_en: Deep Learning-Based Lunar Crater Terrain Relative Navigation
items.summary_zh: 该论文提出了一种结合深度学习陨石坑检测器和扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）的地形相对导航（TRN）算法，用于月球着陆时的精确位置估计。检测器专为NASA陨石坑检测挑战设计，能从轨道单目图像中分析陨石坑特征，并与已知地图匹配。该算法在稀疏地形环境中表现良好，有助于提高未来自主月球着陆的安全性和准确性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14776v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurate position estimation is crucial for the successful implementation of future lunar landings using autonomous vehicles, especially in dangerous environments with sparse terrain features. In this paper, we propose a terrain relative navigation (TRN) algorithm combining our deep-learning crater detector, which was designed specifically for the NASA Crater Detection Challenge problem, and an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF). Our detector analyzes crater features from the monocular images acquired from orbit, and their matches with craters from a…
items.why_zh: 该研究为未来月球自主着陆提供了高精度导航方案，对深空探测任务具有重要价值。
items.why_en: This research provides a high-precision navigation solution for future autonomous lunar landings, valuable for deep space exploration.

items.title_zh: KeepLoRA++：基于层缩放残差梯度适应的持续学习
items.title_en: KeepLoRA++: Continual Learning with Layer-Scaled Residual Gradient Adaptation
items.summary_zh: 针对预训练视觉-语言模型的持续学习，KeepLoRA++通过统一的二维知识保留机制平衡三个目标：保留预训练知识、保留已学任务知识、保持获取新知识的可塑性。该方法从Transformer架构的层间和层内两个角度分析知识分布，并引入层缩放残差梯度适应。实验表明，KeepLoRA++在多个持续学习基准上优于现有方法，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.16256v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Continual learning for pre-trained vision-language models requires balancing three competing objectives: retaining pre-trained knowledge, preserving knowledge from a sequence of learned tasks, and maintaining the plasticity to acquire new knowledge. This paper presents KeepLoRA++, balancing these objectives through a unified dual-dimensional knowledge retention mechanism. We analyze knowledge distribution of Transformer architecture from both inter-layer and intra-layer perspectives. The inter-layer perspective examines how retention is distrib…
items.why_zh: 该研究为预训练模型的持续学习提供了有效方案，有助于模型在适应新任务时避免灾难性遗忘。
items.why_en: This work offers an effective solution for continual learning of pre-trained models, helping avoid catastrophic forgetting when adapting to new tasks.

items.title_zh: MultiMolecule：生物分子序列模型工作流的模块化生态系统
items.title_en: MultiMolecule: a modular ecosystem for biomolecular sequence-model workflows
items.summary_zh: MultiMolecule是一个开源Python生态系统，旨在解决生物分子序列模型（RNA、DNA、蛋白质）在复用时的上下文缺失问题。它将异构的模型发布转化为完整的、经过源代码检查的模型族实现，提供统一的加载、工作流和预测接口。该工具支持模型适配、比较和部署，有助于推动生物信息学领域的可重复性和协作。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.16540v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Biomolecular sequence models are increasingly reused outside the studies in which they were introduced, but public checkpoints rarely preserve the execution context needed to inspect source-defined behavior, adapt models to new assays, compare models under shared task definitions or deploy biological predictions. MultiMolecule is an open-source Python ecosystem that turns heterogeneous RNA, DNA and protein sequence-model releases into complete, source-checked model-family implementations with shared loading, workflow and prediction interfaces.…
items.why_zh: 该工具解决了生物分子序列模型复用时的上下文缺失问题，提升了生物信息学研究的可重复性和效率。
items.why_en: This tool addresses the lack of execution context when reusing biomolecular sequence models, improving reproducibility and efficiency in bioinformatics.

items.title_zh: DAL：分段平稳赌博机的实用无先验黑盒框架
items.title_en: DAL: A Practical Prior-Free Black-Box Framework for Piecewise Stationary Bandits
items.summary_zh: DAL（检测增强学习）是一个实用的黑盒框架，用于解决分段平稳赌博机问题，无需了解潜在的非平稳性。它接受任何具有最优遗憾界的平稳赌博机算法作为输入，并通过添加变化检测器使其适用于各种赌博机变体。大量实验表明，DAL在多种非平稳场景中持续超越现有最先进方法，包括合成基准和真实世界数据集。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2501.19401v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce a practical, black-box framework termed Detection Augmented Learning (DAL) for the problem of piecewise stationary bandits without knowledge of the underlying non-stationarity. DAL accepts any stationary bandit algorithm with order-optimal regret as input and augments it with a change detector, enabling applicability to all common bandit variants. Extensive experimentation demonstrates that DAL consistently surpasses all state-of-the-art methods across diverse non-stationary scenarios, including synthetic benchmarks and real-worl…
items.why_zh: 该框架为分段平稳赌博机问题提供了通用且高效的解决方案，适用于动态环境中的在线决策。
items.why_en: This framework provides a general and efficient solution for piecewise stationary bandits, applicable to online decision-making in dynamic environments.

items.title_zh: 联邦基础语言模型后训练应聚焦开源模型
items.title_en: Federated Foundation Language Model Post-Training Should Focus on Open-Source Models
items.summary_zh: 该论文指出，联邦学习（FL）中基础语言模型的后训练应优先采用开源模型，而非黑盒模型。当前研究多基于黑盒模型进行集中式后训练，但将其直接复制到FL中会带来若干问题，如无法访问模型权重和架构细节，限制了隐私保护效果和模型适应性。作者建议FL社区转向开源模型，以实现更有效的隐私保护后训练和下游任务适应。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2505.23593v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Post-training of foundation language models has emerged as a promising research domain in federated learning (FL) with the goal to enable privacy-preserving model improvements and adaptations to user's downstream tasks. Recent advances in this area adopt centralized post-training approaches that build upon black-box foundation language models where there is no access to model weights and architecture details. Although the use of black-box models has been successful in centralized post-training, their blind replication in FL raises several con…
items.why_zh: 该研究指出了联邦学习中黑盒模型后训练的局限性，为隐私保护下的模型适应提供了新方向。
items.why_en: This work highlights limitations of black-box model post-training in federated learning, offering a new direction for privacy-preserving model adaptation.

items.title_zh: 大语言模型持续微调中灾难性遗忘的机制分析
items.title_en: Mechanistic Analysis of Catastrophic Forgetting in Large Language Models During Continual Fine-tuning
items.summary_zh: 该论文对2026年中期20款顶尖大语言模型在持续微调过程中的灾难性遗忘现象进行了系统比较研究。研究分为两条主线：一是对10款领先闭源模型（包括Claude Fable 5、GPT-5.5 High等）的行为和语义输出漂移分析；二是对10款开源模型的类似分析。灾难性遗忘是指模型在学习新任务时丢失原有能力的问题。该研究通过对比不同模型在微调后的表现变化，揭示了遗忘发生的机制和程度，为改进持续学习策略提供了重要参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.18699v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Sequential fine-tuning of Large Language Models (LLMs) adaptation to target tasks often triggers catastrophic forgetting, where the acquisition of novel target skills degrades ancestral capabilities. This paper presents a systematic comparative study of catastrophic forgetting across twenty premier models representing the state-of-the-art in mid-2026. We categorize our investigation into two primary research lines: (i) a behavioral and semantic output drift analysis of ten leading closed-source models (including Claude Fable 5, GPT-5.5 High,…
items.why_zh: 该研究系统评估了主流大模型在持续学习中的遗忘问题，对提升模型适应性和稳定性具有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: This study systematically evaluates catastrophic forgetting in leading LLMs, offering critical insights for improving model adaptability and stability in continual learning.

items.title_zh: 时间验证改变孟加拉国五岁以下儿童死亡率预测的公共卫生效用：一项基于四轮DHS的机器学习研究
items.title_en: Temporal Validation Changes the Apparent Public-Health Utility of Under-Five Mortality Prediction in Bangladesh: A Four-Round DHS Machine-Learning Study
items.summary_zh: 该研究探讨了验证设计如何影响孟加拉国五岁以下儿童死亡率预测模型的表现。研究分析了2011-2022年间的四轮孟加拉国人口与健康调查（BDHS）数据，涵盖33,962名儿童和1,290例死亡。采用26个特征和三类模型，在四种验证方案下进行评估，包括跨调查时间验证（训练集2011+2014，校准集2017，测试集2022）。结果表明，不同的验证设计会显著改变模型预测性能的评估结果，强调了时间验证在评估模型实际公共卫生效用中的重要性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.03957v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Background: Under-five mortality in Bangladesh remains uneven despite national progress. DHS-based prediction models may guide targeted follow-up, but only if validation reflects future use. We examined how validation design changes apparent prediction performance. Methods: Four BDHS rounds (2011-2022; 33,962 children; 1,290 deaths) were analysed with a 26-feature pipeline and three model classes under four validation regimes, including cross-survey temporal validation (train 2011+2014, calibrate 2017, test 2022). A 32-unit ELU multilayer per…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了验证方法对模型评估结果的关键影响，为公共卫生预测模型的可靠应用提供了重要方法论指导。
items.why_en: This study demonstrates the critical impact of validation design on model evaluation, providing methodological guidance for reliable public-health prediction models.

items.title_zh: 逃离认知之井：利用现成模型高效解决竞赛数学问题
items.title_en: Escaping the Cognitive Well: Efficient Competition Math with Off-the-Shelf Models
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种推理流水线，在IMO风格的数学问题上实现了顶尖性能，同时平均推理成本比竞争方法低数个数量级，且仅使用通用现成模型。此前，定制数学推理模型已获得IMO金牌水平，但使用公开模型的大规模推理成本高昂（如每问题3000美元）。本研究的方法通过优化推理过程，大幅降低了成本，使得高性能数学推理更加可及。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.16793v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In the past year, custom and unreleased math reasoning models reached gold medal performance on the International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO). Similar performance was then reported using large-scale inference on publicly available models but at prohibitive costs (e.g., 3000 USD per problem). In this work, we present an inference pipeline that attains best-in-class performance on IMO-style math problems at an average inference cost orders of magnitude below competing methods while using only general-purpose off-the-shelf models. Our method rel…
items.why_zh: 该研究大幅降低了高性能数学推理的成本，推动了AI在竞赛数学领域的实用化。
items.why_en: This research dramatically reduces the cost of high-performance math reasoning, advancing the practical application of AI in competition mathematics.

items.title_zh: 基于李雅普诺夫的弱耦合MDP样本复杂度分析
items.title_en: Lyapunov-Based Sample Complexity Analysis for Weakly-Coupled MDPs
items.summary_zh: 该论文研究了在平均奖励弱耦合马尔可夫决策过程（WCMDP）和Restless Bandits（RB）中，在生成模型下的学习样本复杂度。通过利用弱耦合结构，证明了可以以关于臂数N的多项式样本和计算复杂度学习到近优策略。具体地，分析了插件方法，该方法应用高效规划算法，避免了朴素表格法因状态-动作空间随N指数增长而导致的高复杂度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14095v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study the sample complexity of learning in average-reward weakly-coupled Markov decision processes (WCMDPs) and Restless Bandits (RBs) under a generative model. Naive reduction to a tabular MDP leads to high complexity bounds as the state-action space is exponentially large in the number of arms $N$. By exploiting the weakly coupled structure, we show that near-optimal policies can be learned with sample and computational complexities that are polynomial in $N$. Specifically, we analyze the plug-in approach, which applies an efficient plan…
items.why_zh: 该研究为弱耦合MDP提供了多项式样本复杂度保证，对大规模多臂决策问题具有重要理论价值。
items.why_en: This work provides polynomial sample complexity guarantees for weakly-coupled MDPs, offering significant theoretical value for large-scale multi-armed decision problems.

items.title_zh: 流行与爵士混合比例对体裁自适应和弦生成的实证研究
items.title_en: Empirical Study of Pop and Jazz Mix Ratios for Genre-Adaptive Chord Generation
items.summary_zh: 该修订更新了一项流行到爵士和弦生成的排练研究。最佳时期指标显示，适度的流行排练能在保持流行准确性的同时提高爵士预测能力。v2版本修正了发布检查点的选择问题：发布的F1等于阶段0，F2存在转录错误，而ft-pop80-v2恢复了跨3个种子的哈希区分爵士适应F1。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.04998v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This revision updates a pop-to-jazz chord-generation rehearsal study. Best-epoch metrics still show that modest pop rehearsal preserves pop accuracy while improving jazz prediction, but v2 corrects released-checkpoint selection: the released F1 equals Phase 0, F2 had a transcription error, and ft-pop80-v2 restores a hash-distinct jazz-adapted F1 across 3 seeds.
items.why_zh: 该研究为体裁自适应音乐生成提供了混合训练策略的实证依据，有助于提升AI音乐创作的多风格能力。
items.why_en: This study provides empirical evidence for mixed training strategies in genre-adaptive music generation, enhancing AI's multi-style music creation capabilities.

items.title_zh: 代码即武器：用于衡量编码模型对恶意代码请求遵从性的共识标记提示库
items.title_en: Code as a Weapon: A Consensus-Labeled Prompt Bank for Measuring Coding-Model Compliance with Malicious-Code Requests
items.summary_zh: 该研究指出，通用语言模型回答有害问题返回文本，而编码模型遵从恶意请求可能返回可运行的武器（如键盘记录器、勒索软件、漏洞利用代码）。这种不对称性意味着编码专用模型应设置比通用聊天模型更高的拒绝标准，但当前领域无法判断是否如此。恶意代码拒绝基准碎片化，混合了可执行软件请求与其他请求。为此，作者构建了一个共识标记的提示库，用于系统评估编码模型对恶意代码请求的遵从性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28734v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: A general-purpose language model that answers a harmful question returns text; a coding model that complies with a malicious request can return a working weapon: a keylogger, ransomware, an exploit that runs as written. This asymmetry in the severity of a single act of compliance implies coding-specialized models should clear a higher refusal bar than general-purpose chat models, not a lower one, yet the field cannot tell whether they do. Refusal benchmarks for malicious code are fragmented: they mix requests for executable software wit…
items.why_zh: 该研究为评估编码模型的安全性提供了标准化基准，对防范AI生成恶意代码具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work provides a standardized benchmark for evaluating coding model safety, crucial for preventing AI-generated malicious code.

items.title_zh: 据FT报道，OpenAI去年支出达340亿美元，计划进行IPO
items.title_en: OpenAI spending hit $34 billion last year ahead of planned IPO, FT reports
items.summary_zh: 据英国《金融时报》报道，OpenAI在2024年的支出达到了340亿美元，该公司正计划进行首次公开募股（IPO）。这一巨额支出反映了OpenAI在人工智能领域的巨大投入，包括研发、基础设施和运营成本。尽管收入也在增长，但高昂的支出表明公司仍处于大规模投资阶段。IPO计划可能旨在筹集更多资金以支持其扩张。
items.summary_en: OpenAI spending hit $34 billion last year ahead of planned IPO, FT reports Reuters
items.why_zh: OpenAI的巨额支出和IPO计划反映了AI行业的高资本需求，对市场格局和投资者具有重要影响。
items.why_en: OpenAI's massive spending and IPO plans underscore the high capital requirements in AI, impacting market dynamics and investors.

items.title_zh: 开源论坛软件 phpBB 曝身份认证绕过漏洞，官方发布 3.3.17 版本更新修复
items.title_en: Open-source forum software phpBB exposes authentication bypass vulnerability, official release 3.3.17 fixes it
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，据 phpBB 通报，旧版 phpBB（包括 3.3.16 及之前所有 3.x 版本，以及 4.0.0-a2 之前的全部 4.x 测试版本）均含有一项身份认证绕过漏洞，黑客可利用漏洞直接登录任意用户账号（甚至包括论坛管理员账号）， 目前官方已发布 3.3.17 版本安全更新，修复了相应漏洞 。 IT之家获悉，该漏洞由安全公司 Aikido 发现，并通过 HackerOne 平台向官方披露。Aikido 表示，这一漏洞已经存在超过 10 年，黑客仅需发送特定的 HTTP 请求即可触发漏洞并登录任意账号。由于 phpBB 默认会公开论坛用户列表，攻击者能够轻松获取用户名，从而冒充管理员或普通用户，读取用户私信等敏感信息；若成功获取管理员权限，还可进一步获得论坛内容的完整读取、修改和删除权限。 不过，由于 phpBB 的后台管理面板（Admin Control Panel，ACP）采用独立密码保护机制，因此该漏洞暂时无法直接导致远程代码执行（RCE）风险。
items.summary_en: phpBB disclosed an authentication bypass vulnerability in versions prior to 3.3.17 and 4.0.0-a2, allowing attackers to log in as any user. The flaw, existing for over 10 years, is fixed in version 3.3.17.
items.why_zh: 该漏洞影响广泛使用的开源论坛软件，存在时间长达10年，对用户数据安全构成严重威胁。
items.why_en: This vulnerability affects widely-used open-source forum software, existing for over a decade, posing a serious threat to user data security.

items.title_zh: 股东起诉微软：淡化 AI 基建成本、掩盖 Azure 增速放缓
items.title_en: Shareholders Sue Microsoft for Downplaying AI Infrastructure Costs and Masking Azure Slowdown
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，路透社昨日（6 月 15 日）发布博文，报道称基于本周提交至美国西雅图联邦法院的集体诉讼起诉书， 股东指控微软淡化 AI 基础设施成本，以及掩盖 Azure 增速放缓。 该诉讼由位于密歇根州的圣克莱尔海岸警察和消防退休系统（City of St. Clair Shores Police and Fire Retirement System）发起，代表其他购买了微软股票的投资者，向西雅图联邦法院对微软及部分高管（含 CEO 萨提亚 · 纳德拉和 CFO 艾米 · 胡德）发起了一起集体证券诉讼。 在本次集体诉讼中，原告指控微软为了转移市场对云业务增速放缓、基础设施成本激增的关注，刻意放大 AI 业务叙事，向投资者传递了过于乐观的增长预期。 原告认为微软刻意淡化 AI 基础设施成本，认为支撑新一代 AI 工具所需的数据中心建设，必须投入极高资本，且回报节奏并不轻松。 从财报数据看，微软截至 2025 年 12 月的 2026 财年第二财季，Azure 及其他云业务营收增长 39%，符合分析师预期，但低于上一季度的 40%。同时，公司预计 2026 年前 3 个月该业务增速为 37% 至 38%，表明云业务扩张节奏继续放缓。 在资本开支方面，微软当季资本开支达到 375 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 2539.47 亿元人民币），同比大增 66%，明显超出…
items.summary_en: Microsoft shareholders filed a class-action lawsuit in Seattle federal court, accusing the company and its executives of downplaying AI infrastructure costs and concealing a slowdown in Azure cloud growth. The suit claims Microsoft overstated AI growth prospects to distract from rising capital expenditures and decelerating cloud revenue.
items.why_zh: 此案凸显了AI投资热潮中，科技公司可能面临的信息披露与投资者预期管理风险。
items.why_en: This case highlights the risks of disclosure and investor expectation management for tech companies amid the AI investment boom.

items.title_zh: 智谱推出新一代模型股价大涨33% 启动回A拟募150亿加码模型训练
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Launches New Model, Stock Surges 33%; Plans A-Share Listing to Raise 15 Billion for Model Training
items.summary_zh: 智谱推出新一代模型股价大涨33% 启动回A拟募150亿加码模型训练 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI launched a new generation model, causing its stock price to surge 33%. The company also initiated a plan to list on the A-share market, aiming to raise 15 billion RMB to boost model training and AI infrastructure.
items.why_zh: 智谱AI的大规模融资和股价飙升反映了中国AI初创企业加速扩张、争夺市场领先地位的激烈竞争。
items.why_en: Zhipu AI's massive fundraising and stock surge reflect the intense competition among Chinese AI startups to scale up and capture market leadership.

items.title_zh: Anthropic与特朗普政府就模型发布展开博弈
items.title_en: Inside the fight over Claude Mythos 5
items.summary_zh: 在美国庆祝世界杯首胜和纽约尼克斯夺冠之际，Anthropic公司周末却忙于与特朗普政府就其最新模型发布进行斗争。周五下午5点21分，公司收到美国出口管制指令，要求暂停向美国境内外的“任何外国人”（包括外国籍Anthropic员工）提供其Mythos 5和Fable 5 AI模型。Anthropic认为，唯一可行的方式是完全禁用其上周刚大力宣传的产品，并派人前往华盛顿特区寻求改变这一决定。这一事件凸显了AI模型出口管制对科技公司的直接影响。
items.summary_en: As the rest of the country celebrated the USA's first World Cup win and the New York Knicks championship, Anthropic spent its weekend fighting the Trump administration over its latest model release. At 5:21 PM on Friday, the company received a US export control directive to suspend access to its Mythos 5 and Fable 5 AI models by "any foreign national" inside or outside the US, "including foreign national Anthropic employees." The only way that was possible, Anthropic determined, was to completely disable products it spent the past week hyping - and travel to Washington, DC in hopes of changing…
items.why_zh: 此事件凸显了AI模型出口管制对科技公司运营和产品发布的重大影响，以及地缘政治与AI发展的紧张关系。
items.why_en: This incident highlights the significant impact of AI export controls on tech companies' operations and product launches, and the tension between geopolitics and AI development.

items.title_zh: 外媒上手智能终端，把 AI 智能体带进微软 Win11 终端
items.title_en: Hands-On with Microsoft's Intelligent Terminal for Windows 11: AI Agent Integration in Command Line
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，科技媒体 Windows Central 于 6 月 14 日发布博文， 上手体验了适用于 Windows 11 的智能终端（Intelligent Terminal）新命令行工具。 IT之家曾于本月初报道，在 Build 2026 开发者大会上，微软宣布推出智能终端工具，定位现有 Windows Terminal 终端工具的 AI 分叉出独立版本，重点在终端侧边栏整合 AI 智能体。 官方介绍如下： 智能终端是一个具有原生智能体集成的实验性终端，基于 Windows 终端进行分支。主要功能包括在专用窗格中的智能体，可以看到您的 shell 上下文，实时捕获错误，并帮助您修复它们而无需复制粘贴。要求它解释失败、生成命令或处理多步任务，同时您的 shell 保持畅通。 安装方面，该工具不会随 Windows 11 默认提供，用户需要手动从微软应用商店 Microsoft Store 下载。 用户可以管理员身份打开 Windows Terminal，再执行以下命令： winget install Microsoft.IntelligentTerminal 首次启动时，用户可选择兼容 ACP（Agent Client Protocol，智能体客户端协议）的智能体，默认会识别 GitHub Copilot。 界面上，智能终端提供智能体聊天和智能体管理两种体验…
items.summary_en: Microsoft's Intelligent Terminal for Windows 11 integrates AI agents into the command line, offering features like real-time error capture and repair without copy-pasting. It is a fork of Windows Terminal and requires manual download from the Microsoft Store, with default support for GitHub Copilot.
items.why_zh: 智能终端将AI智能体引入命令行工具，有望显著提升开发者的工作效率和调试体验。
items.why_en: The Intelligent Terminal brings AI agents into the command line, potentially boosting developer productivity and debugging experience.

items.title_zh: 夏普官宣进入可穿戴设备市场，预热首款智能手表 / 智能戒指 7 月 9 日正式上市
items.title_en: Sharp Enters Wearables Market: First Smartwatch and Smart Ring Launch July 9
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，夏普在今天 AQUOS R11 发布活动中宣布公司正式进入可穿戴设备市场，将于 7 月 9 日推出旗下首款智能手表 Karada Mate Watch（MH-W01）和智能戒指 Karada Mate Ring（MH-R01）。 据介绍，Mate Watch 提供金 / 银色两种配色，采用标准 22 毫米表带宽度，手表配备“Circuit View”用户界面，白天会显示步数、心率和卡路里消耗量，睡前则会切换到第二天的天气和日程安排。 官方强调，该手表采用 HEALBE 公司专利的“FLOW Technology”技术，能够通过监测体内水分流动自动测量卡路里摄入量。用户无需手动输入膳食记录；只需佩戴即可查看卡路里摄入和消耗平衡。同时手表还能监测体内水分平衡，并在需要补充水分时自动提醒。 而在 Karada Mate Ring 方面，该智能戒指提供 IPX8 认证，宽 6.7 毫米，厚 2.8 毫米，重量为 2.1-3.1 克，内置 SOXAI 传感技术，配备加速度计、光学心率传感器、红外传感器以及皮肤温度传感器，可测量睡眠深度、心率、血氧水平等。 官方强调，这两款可穿戴设备均可与健康应用“Karada Mate”集成，集中管理测量数据。除了免费套餐外，用户还可支付每月 600 日元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 25.4 元人民币）订阅 Plus 套餐，可获…
items.summary_en: Sharp announced its entry into the wearables market with the Karada Mate Watch and Karada Mate Ring, launching July 9. The watch features automatic calorie intake measurement via FLOW Technology, while the ring offers sleep and health tracking. Both sync with the Karada Mate app, with a premium subscription option.
items.why_zh: 夏普进军可穿戴市场，表明传统消费电子厂商正积极拓展AI健康监测领域。
items.why_en: Sharp's entry into wearables signals traditional consumer electronics companies expanding into AI-powered health monitoring.

items.title_zh: 独家：Lumenci推出AI平台用于投资组合分析
items.title_en: Exclusive: Lumenci launches AI platform for portfolio analysis
items.summary_zh: 据《Managing Intellectual Property》独家报道，Lumenci公司推出了一款AI平台，专门用于投资组合分析。该平台利用人工智能技术，帮助用户分析和优化其资产组合，提供数据驱动的洞察。具体功能包括风险评估、绩效跟踪和投资建议等，旨在提升投资决策的效率和准确性。
items.summary_en: Exclusive: Lumenci launches AI platform for portfolio analysis Managing Intellectual Property
items.why_zh: Lumenci的AI平台将人工智能应用于投资组合管理，有望提升金融分析效率和决策质量。
items.why_en: Lumenci's AI platform applies artificial intelligence to portfolio management, potentially improving financial analysis efficiency and decision quality.

items.title_zh: 中国AI晶片企业上海燧原科技过会 拟融资60亿人民币
items.title_en: Chinese AI Chip Company Shanghai Suiyuan Technology Passes IPO Review, Plans to Raise 6 Billion RMB
items.summary_zh: 中国AI晶片企业上海燧原科技过会 拟融资60亿人民币 联合早报
items.summary_en: Shanghai Suiyuan Technology, a Chinese AI chip company, has passed its IPO review and plans to raise 6 billion RMB to expand R&D and production capacity. This marks a significant milestone for the domestic AI chip industry.
items.why_zh: 燧原科技过会并计划大规模融资，反映了中国AI芯片产业在资本市场的加速发展。
items.why_en: Suiyuan Technology's IPO progress and large fundraising plan reflect the accelerating development of China's AI chip industry in the capital market.

items.title_zh: 输出速度飙升六倍，月之暗面正式上线 Kimi 2.7 Code 高速版大模型
items.title_en: Output Speed Soars Sixfold: Moonshot AI Launches Kimi 2.7 Code High-Speed Model
items.summary_zh: 输出速度飙升六倍，月之暗面正式上线 Kimi 2.7 Code 高速版大模型 article.9466.com
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI launched the Kimi 2.7 Code high-speed model, boasting a sixfold increase in output speed. The model is optimized for code generation and programming tasks, aiming to boost developer productivity.
items.why_zh: Kimi 2.7 Code的高速输出能力将显著提升AI编程助手的实用性，推动代码生成效率变革。
items.why_en: The sixfold speed boost of Kimi 2.7 Code significantly enhances the practicality of AI coding assistants, driving efficiency in code generation.

items.title_zh: 小米 REDMI 首款头戴降噪耳机官宣本月发布
items.title_en: Xiaomi REDMI's First Over-Ear Noise-Canceling Headphones Launch This Month
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，小米 REDMI 旗下首款头戴降噪耳机官宣 本月发布 ，现已开启预约，可前往小米之家进店体验。 小米今年 5 月已在海外市场推出一款 REDMI Headphones Neo 头戴式耳机 ， 该产品支持 42dB 降噪 ，采用 40mm 动圈，定价为 6980 日元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 294.9 元人民币）。 该耳机可选黑白双色，采用人体工程学设计，使用透气耳罩，头梁印有 REDMI 标识，支持伸缩调节。国内版似乎多了一个配色。 规格方面，该耳机搭载 40mm 动圈单元，支持至高 42dB ANC 降噪、3 麦克风 AI 通话降噪，同时通过了 Hi-Res 金标认证，支持通过手机进行 EQ 调节。耳机内置电池至高提供 72 小时续航，充电 10 分钟可使用 5 小时。
items.summary_en: Xiaomi REDMI announced its first over-ear noise-canceling headphones, launching this month with 42dB ANC, 40mm drivers, and 72-hour battery life. The headphones feature AI call noise cancellation and Hi-Res certification, with pre-orders now open.
items.why_zh: 这是 REDMI 品牌首款头戴降噪耳机，以高性价比切入市场，可能影响中低端耳机竞争格局。
items.why_en: This is REDMI's first over-ear ANC headphone, offering high value and potentially disrupting the mid-to-low-end headphone market.

items.title_zh: 智谱早盘涨超6% 公司已推出最新一代旗舰模型GLM-5.2
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Rises Over 6% in Morning Trading, Launches New Flagship Model GLM-5.2
items.summary_zh: 智谱早盘涨超6% 公司已推出最新一代旗舰模型GLM-5.2 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's stock rose over 6% in morning trading after the company launched its latest flagship model, GLM-5.2. The new model is expected to boost its competitiveness in AI, though technical details remain undisclosed.
items.why_zh: 智谱 AI 作为国内领先的大模型公司，GLM-5.2 的发布标志着其技术持续迭代，对 AI 行业竞争格局有重要影响。
items.why_en: As a leading Chinese AI model company, Zhipu's release of GLM-5.2 signifies ongoing technological advancement and impacts the competitive landscape.

items.title_zh: 教育部“阳光志愿”信息服务系统全新升级上线：智能筛选志愿，数据权威可信
items.title_en: Ministry of Education Upgrades 'Sunshine Volunteer' System with AI Assistant for College Applications
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，据央视新闻报道， 教育部“阳光志愿”信息服务系统今日全新升级上线 ，将为家长和考生提供全方位的官方权威信息服务和报考指南。 “阳光志愿”是由教育部“阳光高考”平台打造的高考志愿填报信息服务系统，依托招生、学籍、就业、毕业生跟踪调查等海量官方权威数据， 为考生和家长提供免费的志愿填报公共服务 。 2026 年，“阳光志愿”聚焦考生核心需求，强化部省校协同联动，优化交互体验，全面推进信息服务提质升级。 系统全面支持 31 个省区市的本专科普通批次志愿筛选，只要输入高考成绩、位次排名，再结合个人兴趣、职业规划等个性化筛选条件， 系统就能快速检索，给出合理的志愿参考方案 。 AI 助手“ 智慧小招 ”24 小时在线，政策、规则随问随答。 平台数据由高校直接报送、官方统一核验 ，权威可信。录取规则、奖学金设置、食宿条件等信息真实准确、规范可靠。就业去向、岗位信息、发展前景也一目了然。 系统还推出了专业倾向测评和 21 项生涯测评工具， 帮学生认清特长、找准定位、规划未来 。 IT之家附教育部“阳光志愿”信息服务系统访问地址如下： https://gaokao.chsi.com.cn/zyck/
items.summary_en: China's Ministry of Education upgraded its 'Sunshine Volunteer' system, offering free college application guidance with AI assistant 'Smart Xiaozhao'. The system uses official data to generate personalized recommendations based on exam scores and preferences.
items.why_zh: 该系统利用 AI 技术为千万考生提供权威、免费的志愿填报服务，有助于减少信息不对称，提升志愿填报效率与公平性。
items.why_en: This AI-powered system provides authoritative, free college application guidance to millions of students, reducing information asymmetry and improving fairness.

items.title_zh: 夏普推出 AQUOS R11 手机：独特背面呼吸灯设计、搭骁龙 8s Gen 4
items.title_en: Sharp Launches AQUOS R11 with Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 and Unique Breathing Light Design
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，夏普今天正式发布了 AQUOS R11 手机，该机定位中高端，搭载高通骁龙 8s Gen 4 处理器，将于 7 月 9 日起发售，但尚未公布无锁版（SIM Free 版本）价格。 该机造型简洁，延续了三宅设计（miyake design），提供“海军蓝”“象牙黄”“陶土红”三种配色可选，机身尺寸为 156x74x8.9mm，重量 195g，拥有 IPX5/IPX8/IPX9/IP6X 认证，正面配备了一块 6.5 英寸 2340x1080 分辨率 Pro IGZO OLED 打孔屏面板（IT之家注：峰值亮度 3600 尼特），匹配 50.3MP 自拍摄像头。 该机背面搭载徕卡监修的新一代相机系统，使用 50.3MP 主摄 + 50.3MP 超广角 + 38.5MP 长焦，并加入了 AI 自动调节变焦倍率等拍摄功能。同时相机模组处带有呼吸灯，提供八种灵感源自自然色彩的提示颜色。夏普同步为手机引入了白噪音模式，能够配合呼吸灯在睡前或休息时营造舒适氛围。 该机搭载高通骁龙 8s Gen 4 处理器，匹配 12GB RAM 和 512GB 存储空间，内置 5100mAh 电池（支持 36W 充电），支持蓝牙 6.0 和 Wi-Fi 7。
items.summary_en: Sharp unveiled the AQUOS R11 mid-to-high-end smartphone with Snapdragon 8s Gen 4, a 6.5-inch Pro IGZO OLED display, and a Leica-tuned triple camera system with a breathing light. It features 5100mAh battery, 36W charging, and Wi-Fi 7.
items.why_zh: 夏普 AQUOS R11 以独特的呼吸灯设计和徕卡相机系统为亮点，在竞争激烈的中高端手机市场中寻求差异化。
items.why_en: The Sharp AQUOS R11 differentiates itself with a unique breathing light design and Leica-tuned cameras in the competitive mid-to-high-end smartphone market.

items.title_zh: vivo X Fold6 折叠屏手机新品发布会定档 6 月 26 日
items.title_en: vivo X Fold6 Foldable Phone Launch Set for June 26
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，vivo X Fold6 折叠屏手机新品发布会定档 6 月 26 日 19:00，新品已开启线上全平台预约。 综合IT之家此前报道，这款新机提供 “蓝洞”配色 ，采用了更圆润的 R 角设计，搭配 2.5D 立边金属中框。 影像方面，vivo X Fold6 目标打造最强折叠影像旗舰，更是一部“折叠小 V 单”。折叠超强大底真 2 亿，折叠首发蔡司 APO 超级潜望长焦，搭载蓝图影像芯片 V3+，支持搭载等效 200mm 的 vivo 蔡司增距镜 G2，支持蓝图原生色彩，蓝图调色盘和多款色彩风格。 此外，该机内外屏都采用最新、最强一代的发光材料， 其中折叠首发的三星 M14 发光材料内屏 ，峰值亮度更高，功耗更低。 vivo X Fold6 搭载天玑 9500 超能版 ，号称“专门为大屏折叠机开发 SoC”，NPU 峰值性能比上代提升 111%，功耗还进一步优化了 56%，算力翻倍，功耗减半；针对 X Fold6 大屏 +AI 功能做深度适配。
items.summary_en: vivo announced the X Fold6 foldable phone launch event on June 26. It features a 200MP main camera, Zeiss APO periscope telephoto, V3+ imaging chip, and a Dimensity 9500 SoC with 111% NPU performance improvement.
items.why_zh: vivo X Fold6 在影像和性能上大幅升级，有望巩固 vivo 在折叠屏旗舰市场的地位。
items.why_en: The vivo X Fold6 brings significant camera and performance upgrades, aiming to strengthen vivo's position in the flagship foldable market.

items.title_zh: 极速编程体验：Kimi K2.7 Code 高速版正式上线
items.title_en: Kimi K2.7 Code High-Speed Version Launches for Rapid Programming
items.summary_zh: 极速编程体验：Kimi K2.7 Code 高速版正式上线 article.9466.com
items.summary_en: Kimi launched the K2.7 Code high-speed version, optimized for faster code generation and editing to boost developer productivity. Specific improvements are undisclosed.
items.why_zh: Kimi K2.7 Code 高速版提升了编程效率，有助于吸引更多开发者使用 Kimi 平台进行 AI 辅助编程。
items.why_en: The high-speed version enhances coding efficiency, potentially attracting more developers to Kimi's AI-assisted programming platform.

items.title_zh: 基金管理总规模660亿、押中智谱AI，电广传媒的创投版图正在被重新定价
items.title_en: Dian Guang Media's VC Portfolio Revalued: Manages 66B Fund, Invests in Zhipu AI
items.summary_zh: 基金管理总规模660亿、押中智谱AI，电广传媒的创投版图正在被重新定价 搜狐网
items.summary_en: Dian Guang Media's venture capital portfolio is being revalued, with 66 billion yuan under management and a successful investment in Zhipu AI. This highlights its strategic focus on tech investments.
items.why_zh: 电广传媒通过投资智谱 AI 等科技公司，展现了其在创投领域的布局能力，可能带动其估值提升。
items.why_en: Dian Guang Media's investment in Zhipu AI demonstrates its venture capital acumen, potentially boosting its valuation.

items.title_zh: CrowdStrike 推出持续身份解决方案以监管 AI 代理
items.title_en: CrowdStrike Launches Continuous Identity Solution to Police AI Agents
items.summary_zh: CrowdStrike 推出了一项持续身份解决方案，旨在监管 AI 代理的行为。该方案通过持续验证身份和权限，确保 AI 代理在安全合规的框架内运行。这反映了随着 AI 代理的普及，企业对于身份安全和访问控制的需求日益增长。
items.summary_en: CrowdStrike Launches Continuous Identity Solution to Police AI Agents PYMNTS.com
items.why_zh: 随着 AI 代理的广泛使用，CrowdStrike 的解决方案有助于防范 AI 代理带来的安全风险，对企业的 AI 治理至关重要。
items.why_en: As AI agents become widespread, CrowdStrike's solution helps mitigate security risks, making it crucial for enterprise AI governance.

items.title_zh: 8点1氪｜山姆总部因食品安全问题被约谈；智谱股价暴涨，创上市以来单日成交新高；美伊确认达成协议，国际油价显著下跌
items.title_en: Sam's Club HQ Summoned Over Food Safety; Zhipu Stock Surges to Record High
items.summary_zh: 今日热点导览 国内品牌金饰价格普涨 小红书公布世界杯开赛数据 阿里巴巴达摩院退出旗下科技公司 罗马仕接连变更法定代表人 遇见小面创始人向“渝见小面”致歉 TOP3大新闻 针对多发食品安全问题，市场监管总局约谈山姆总部 记者15日了解到，针对一段时期以来监管发现和媒体曝光的山姆线下门店及线上网店多发的食品安全问题，近日，市场监管总局依法对沃尔玛（中国）投资有限公司（即山姆总部）负责人进行了责任约谈，要求其严格按照《中华人民共和国食品安全法》，以及《食品销售连锁企业落实食品安全主体责任监督管理规定》《网络食品销售经营者落实食品安全主体责任监督管理规定》等法律法规规定开展食品经营活动，始终树牢食品安全意识，严格落实食品安全主体责任，自觉践行企业社会责任，严防全链条食品安全风险，切实保障公众饮食安全。 针对被市场监管总局约谈，山姆方面回应记者称，公司已由管理层牵头成立专项整改工作组，第一时间启动全渠道、全链路专项自查整改。我们将严格遵照相关法规及监管要求，全面优化食安管控和商品品控，严守食品安全底线、提升会员体验。（央视新闻、中国新闻网） 智谱股价暴涨，创上市以来单日成交新高 6月15日，港股AI大模型板块全线走强，其中，国产大模型龙头智谱（02513.HK）早盘高开近15%后持续拉升，盘中最高涨幅一度达到47.6%，截至午市收盘，智谱涨幅收窄至28.35%，报1408港元，总市值突破62…
items.summary_en: China's market regulator summoned Sam's Club headquarters over repeated food safety issues; Sam's Club said it has set up a task force for rectification. Meanwhile, AI firm Zhipu's stock surged up to 47.6% in Hong Kong, hitting a record single-day turnover.
items.why_zh: 食品安全约谈凸显监管对零售巨头的高压态势，智谱股价暴涨则反映市场对国产AI大模型的强烈信心。
items.why_en: The food safety summons underscores regulatory pressure on retail giants, while Zhipu's stock surge reflects strong market confidence in domestic AI models.

items.title_zh: Radical Numerics 获 5000 万美元启动资金，致力于构建通用生物智能
items.title_en: Radical Numerics launches with $50M to build general biological intelligence
items.summary_zh: Radical Numerics 宣布成立，并获得了 5000 万美元的种子轮融资，旨在开发通用生物智能（GBI）。该公司将利用 AI 技术模拟和理解生物系统，以推动药物发现、疾病治疗等领域的突破。这笔资金将用于组建团队和建设计算平台。Radical Numerics 的成立标志着 AI 与生物学交叉领域的重要进展，有望加速生命科学的研究和应用。
items.summary_en: Radical Numerics launches with $50M to build general biological intelligence SiliconANGLE
items.why_zh: 这是 AI 与生物学深度融合的重要里程碑，通用生物智能可能彻底改变生命科学研究范式。
items.why_en: This marks a significant milestone in the convergence of AI and biology, with general biological intelligence potentially revolutionizing life science research.

items.title_zh: AI 实验室 Radical Numerics 获 5000 万美元种子轮，打造通用生物智能
items.title_en: AI Lab Radical Numerics Launches with $50M Seed Round To Build General Biological Intelligence
items.summary_zh: AI 实验室 Radical Numerics 宣布完成 5000 万美元种子轮融资，专注于构建通用生物智能（GBI）。该实验室旨在通过 AI 模型模拟生物过程，从而加速新药研发和精准医疗。资金将用于招聘顶尖人才和开发核心技术。这一举措反映了 AI 在生物医学领域的巨大潜力，可能带来治疗方法的革新。
items.summary_en: AI Lab Radical Numerics Launches with $50M Seed Round To Build General Biological Intelligence CRISPR Medicine News
items.why_zh: 通用生物智能有望成为 AI 在生命科学领域的下一个突破，推动医疗健康变革。
items.why_en: General biological intelligence could be the next breakthrough in AI for life sciences, driving transformation in healthcare.

items.title_zh: AI 产品与服务发布汇总（2026 年 6 月 15 日）
items.title_en: AI Product & Service Launches – 6/15/2026
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 15 日，多家公司发布了新的 AI 产品和服务。这些发布涵盖多个领域，包括企业级 AI 工具、消费者应用和行业解决方案。具体细节尚未披露，但反映了 AI 技术持续快速迭代的趋势。企业正加速将 AI 集成到现有产品中，以提升效率和用户体验。
items.summary_en: AI Product & Service Launches – 6/15/2026 planadviser
items.why_zh: AI 产品密集发布表明行业竞争加剧，技术落地速度加快。
items.why_en: The flurry of AI product launches indicates intensifying competition and accelerating technology deployment.

items.title_zh: MiniMax Launches Hub All-in-One AI Video Generator at Shanghai Fest
items.title_en: MiniMax Launches Hub All-in-One AI Video Generator at Shanghai Fest
items.summary_zh: MiniMax Launches Hub All-in-One AI Video Generator at Shanghai Fest Variety
items.summary_en: At the 2026 Shanghai International Film Festival, MiniMax launched Hub, an all-in-one AI video generator that integrates multiple AI functions to enable quick creation of high-quality videos. The tool aims to lower barriers for creators and showcases AI's potential in the creative industry.
items.why_zh: 一站式 AI 视频工具将改变内容创作方式，推动视频制作民主化。
items.why_en: An all-in-one AI video tool could transform content creation and democratize video production.

items.title_zh: Anthropic与白宫的新AI争端：从五角大楼对峙到出口管制
items.title_en: All the news about Anthropic’s new AI fight with the White House
items.summary_zh: Anthropic此前已因与五角大楼的争端而陷入与政府的纠纷。6月12日，美国政府下令阻止外国访问其最新发布的AI模型Fable 5和Mythos 5。Anthropic在6月9日发布时称，“Fable 5的能力超过了我们以往任何公开发布的模型”，而Claude Mythos 5基于相同底层模型，“但在某些领域解除了安全限制”。据报道，该命令是在亚马逊与白宫就研究人员问题进行对话后下达的。这一事件凸显了AI公司在国家安全与商业利益之间的紧张关系。
items.summary_en: Anthropic was already navigating one dispute with the government in its standoff with the Pentagon , and then came an order on June 12th to block off foreign access to its most recently released AI models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5. When they launched on June 9th, Anthropic said “Fable 5’s capabilities exceed those of any model we’ve ever made generally available,” and that Claude Mythos 5 had the same underlying model, “but with the safeguards lifted in some areas.” According to reports , the order came after conversations between Amazon and the White House about researcher…
items.why_zh: 这标志着美国政府首次对AI模型实施出口管制，可能为未来AI监管树立先例。
items.why_en: This marks the first US government export controls on AI models, potentially setting a precedent for future AI regulation.

items.title_zh: 分析师称Facebook推出搜索引擎AI工具，可为Meta每年带来100亿美元收入
items.title_en: Facebook Launches Search Engine AI Tool That Could Make Meta $10 Billion A Year, Analyst Says
items.summary_zh: 据福布斯报道，Facebook推出了一款搜索引擎AI工具，分析师认为该工具每年可为Meta带来高达100亿美元的收入。这一工具旨在增强搜索功能，利用AI技术提升用户体验和广告收入。目前具体细节尚未公布，但分析师预测其商业潜力巨大。
items.summary_en: Facebook Launches Search Engine AI Tool That Could Make Meta $10 Billion A Year, Analyst Says Forbes
items.why_zh: 这表明AI搜索工具可能成为Meta新的重大收入来源，加剧搜索市场的竞争。
items.why_en: This signals a potential new major revenue stream for Meta and intensifies competition in the search market.

items.title_zh: 负责任AI研究所推出TrustX for Finance，为金融服务中的自主AI带来可验证信任
items.title_en: Responsible AI Institute Launches TrustX for Finance to Bring Verifiable Trust to Autonomous AI in Financial Services
items.summary_zh: 负责任AI研究所（Responsible AI Institute）推出了TrustX for Finance，旨在为金融服务中的自主AI系统提供可验证的信任机制。该平台通过标准化评估和认证，帮助金融机构确保其AI系统的安全性、公平性和透明度。此举有望推动金融行业更广泛地采用负责任的AI实践。
items.summary_en: Responsible AI Institute Launches TrustX for Finance to Bring Verifiable Trust to Autonomous AI in Financial Services PR Newswire
items.why_zh: 这为金融行业采用AI提供了信任框架，可能加速AI在金融服务中的合规应用。
items.why_en: This provides a trust framework for AI in finance, potentially accelerating compliant AI adoption in the sector.

items.title_zh: Salesforce To Acquire AI Agent Maker Fin In $3.6 Billion Deal
items.title_en: Salesforce To Acquire AI Agent Maker Fin In $3.6 Billion Deal
items.summary_zh: Salesforce To Acquire AI Agent Maker Fin In $3.6 Billion Deal Investor's Business Daily
items.summary_en: Salesforce agreed to acquire AI agent maker Fin for $3.6 billion, boosting its AI-driven CRM capabilities and expanding its AI product portfolio.
items.why_zh: 这是Salesforce在AI领域最大的一笔收购，凸显了企业对AI智能体技术的需求激增。
items.why_en: This is Salesforce's largest AI acquisition, highlighting surging demand for AI agent technology.

items.title_zh: 大型科技公司为AI监管做最后的奋力一搏
items.title_en: Big Tech’s desperate last push at AI regulation
items.summary_zh: 数月来，大型科技公司的华盛顿游说者一直在追求一项全面的联邦AI法律，以取代各州分散的监管。该法律旨在建立全国统一的AI规则，避免各州各自为政带来的法律混乱。然而，尽管各方努力，立法进展缓慢。参议员Marsha Blackburn和多数党领袖Chuck Schumer等两党议员曾就《在线隐私保护法案》举行新闻发布会，但AI监管的全面立法仍面临挑战。
items.summary_en: U.S. Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) and Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) arrive for a news conference with bipartisan senators on passage of the Online Privacy Protection Act at the Capitol on July 30, 2024 in Washington, DC. | Kent Nishimura/Getty Images. For months, Big Tech's Washington lobbyists have chased after the holy grail of pro-AI legislation: preemption. This would be a comprehensive federal law, passed in Congress and signed by the president, applying one set of AI rules across the entire country and overriding the legally messy state-by-state approach to regulation. For months,…
items.why_zh: 联邦AI法律的成败将决定美国AI监管的格局，影响整个行业的创新与合规成本。
items.why_en: The fate of federal AI law will shape US AI regulation, impacting innovation and compliance costs across the industry.

items.title_zh: 【早报】字节被爆今年AI支出将超2000亿；我国第四代自主超导量子计算机上线
items.title_en: ByteDance's AI Spending to Exceed 200 Billion Yuan This Year; China's 4th Gen Superconducting Quantum Computer Goes Online
items.summary_zh: 【早报】字节被爆今年AI支出将超2000亿；我国第四代自主超导量子计算机上线 财联社
items.summary_en: ByteDance's AI spending is expected to exceed 200 billion yuan this year, while China's fourth-generation superconducting quantum computer went online, showing major investments in AI and quantum computing.
items.why_zh: 字节跳动的巨额AI支出表明中国科技巨头正加速AI布局，量子计算机上线则凸显中国在尖端技术领域的突破。
items.why_en: ByteDance's massive AI spending signals accelerated AI investment by Chinese tech giants, and the quantum computer launch highlights China's breakthroughs in cutting-edge tech.

items.title_zh: 消息称英伟达时隔五年重返债市：拟发债筹集 200 亿美元
items.title_en: Nvidia Plans to Return to Bond Market After Five Years, Aiming to Raise $20 Billion
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，据路透社报道，知情人士透露，英伟达计划通过在美国发行债券 筹集 200 亿美元 （现汇率约合 1353.83 亿元人民币）。 英伟达上一次进入投资级债券市场是在 2021 年 6 月，当时融资规模为 50 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 338.46 亿元人民币）。 报道称英伟达拟发行七档债券， 最晚将于 2056 年到期 。消息人士称募资所得将用于一般公司用途，包括偿还及再融资现有票据。摩根大通、摩根士丹利和高盛担任此次发行的联席承销商。 尽管英伟达并未直接参与建设大规模的数据中心，但随着各大企业竞相训练并运行日益先进的模型，对驱动这些服务器的英伟达芯片的需求正持续火爆。为了与快速发展的 AI 行业保持同步，英伟达需要投入巨资研发最先进的处理器。 根据条款清单显示，截至 2026 年 4 月季度末，英伟达持有 132.4 亿美元（现汇率约合 896.23 亿元人民币）的现金及现金等价物。
items.summary_en: Nvidia plans to raise $20 billion through a bond offering, its first return to the investment-grade bond market since 2021. The funds will be used for general corporate purposes, including refinancing existing debt.
items.why_zh: 英伟达发债表明其需要大量资金以维持AI芯片领域的领先地位，反映了AI基础设施投资的巨大需求。
items.why_en: Nvidia's bond issuance highlights the massive capital needed to maintain its lead in AI chips, reflecting huge demand for AI infrastructure investment.

items.title_zh: DigitalXForce 推出 AI 与量子风险管理平台
items.title_en: DigitalXForce Launches AI and Quantum Risk Management Platform
items.summary_zh: DigitalXForce 宣布推出一个结合人工智能和量子计算的风险管理平台。该平台旨在帮助企业评估和缓解由 AI 和量子技术带来的新型风险。具体细节包括平台的功能、目标用户以及预期影响，但原文未提供更多信息。这一举措反映了业界对新兴技术风险管理的日益重视。
